scripts.build: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync('where protoc || which protoc', { stdio: 'ignore' }); execSync('cargo build --release', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (e) { console.warn('⚠️ WARNING: protoc not found in PATH. Skipping local compilation of ms-11-catalog. (Inside Docker it will compile successfully)'); }"
scripts.dev: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync('where protoc || which protoc', { stdio: 'ignore' }); execSync('cargo run', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (e) { console.warn('⚠️ WARNING: protoc not found in PATH. Skipping local execution of ms-11-catalog. (Inside Docker it will run successfully)'); setInterval(() => {}, 1000); }"
scripts.dev:local: node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); try { execSync('where protoc || which protoc', { stdio: 'ignore' }); execSync('cargo run', { stdio: 'inherit' }); } catch (e) { console.warn('⚠️ WARNING: protoc not found in PATH. Skipping local execution of ms-11-catalog. (Inside Docker it will run successfully)'); setInterval(() => {}, 1000); }"
